data.title: Crypto News: Token Buybacks Face Timing Flaws, New Models Propose Solution
data.description:
Key Insights: Crypto protocols operate with a fundamental flaw in their token buyback strategies, which concentrate purchases at market peaks while starving them during periods of lower prices. An anonymous Raydium contributor known as Infra identified this structural problem in an Aug. 26 report shared via X
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/29/crypto-news-token-buybacks-face-timing-flaws-new-models-propose-solution/

data.title: Binance to List Mitosis (MITO) on Multiple Platforms
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, Mitosis (MITO) is set to be integrated into several of Binance's services, including Binance Simple Earn, "Buy Crypto," Binance Convert, and Binance Margin. The MITO Flexible Products will be available on Binance Simple Earn starting 2025-08-29 at 15:30 (UTC), allowing users to subscribe to these products. Mitosis is part of the Binance HODLer Airdrops program, which rewards BNB holders with token airdrops based on historical snapshots of their BNB Simple Earn asset or BNB On-Chain Yields balances. Users can participate in these airdrops by subscribing to BNB Simple Earn Products or BNB On-Chain Yields.

For those interested in buying and selling MITO, the "Buy Crypto" page will enable transactions using VISA, MasterCard, Google Pay, Apple Pay, and Revolut. This feature will be accessible within one hour of MITO's listing on Binance Spot. Additionally, Binance Convert will allow users to trade MITO against BTC, USDT, and other tokens without incurring fees, also available within an hour of the listing. On the Binance Margin platform, MITO will be introduced as a new borrowable asset on both Cross and Isolated Margin, with trading pairs MITO/USDT and MITO/USDC available from 2025-08-29 at 15:30 (UTC). Binance advises users to exercise caution and implement risk management strategies when trading newly listed tokens due to potential volatility. Users are encouraged to consult the Margin Data for updated information on marginable assets, limits, collateral ratios, and rates. This integration aims to expand the accessibility and trading options for MITO across Binance's platforms.

data.title: Japanese Gaming Giant Gumi Inc. Plans Major XRP Investment to Boost Blockchain Expansion
data.description: According to Foresight News, Japanese gaming company Gumi Inc., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, has announced its intention to purchase XRP valued at 2.5 billion yen, approximately 17 million USD. This move is part of the company's strategy to expand its blockchain business.

data.title: Whale Increases Ethereum Holdings Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description:
According to PANews, a prominent on-chain analyst, Yu Jin, has reported that a significant Ethereum investor, known for selling HYPE and subsequently buying Ethereum, has increased their holdings. The investor has added more margin, raising their position to 66,700 ETH, valued at approximately $286 million. The current liquidation price is set at $4,214, which is less than $100 away from the current Ethereum price.

The investor began increasing their Ethereum position four days ago. However, this strategy has resulted in a loss of $26.1 million due to the recent market downturn.

data.title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin Eyes September Nasdaq Debut, Hyping Up the Pepenode Presale
data.description:
American Bitcoin, partially owned by Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr, targets a September public debut on the Nasdaq, according to Hut 8 CEO, Asher Genoot. The announcement came from an interview with Reuters during the Bitcoin Asia conference in Hong Kong, with Genoot stating that Hut 8, Eric, and his brother Donald will own 98% of the entity. The new company will retain the name of American Bitcoin and trade with the ticker ABTC. According to Genoot, the Trump brothers found it more advantageous to create and list the company, rather than go for a public IPO, which would give it access to multiple financial avenues anyway
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/trump-bitcoin-mining-firm-eyes-nasdaq-pepenode-top-buy/
